short: A self-hosted web interface for chatting with local and remote language models.
definition: Open WebUI is a self-hosted, browser-based chat interface for language models. It connects to local model runners and to OpenAI-compatible endpoints, giving a single front end for talking to different models with features like conversation history and document upload. It is commonly paired with local serving tools to run a private, ChatGPT-style interface on one's own hardware.
